name: misconception-bridge-create-bridge-packet
title: 生成 execution packet 不等于卡片已经写入
points: bridge output only proves the next execution prompt is ready
until the execution skill returns a file-level result, no card write is proven
execution packet generation and real note creation are different workflow stages
